name: Early out the egg; an encounter with Emil Sinclair in the Backstreets
description:
If only there could be a forgiving world

Artist: yono_neie

Scenario: After being thrown into the Backstreets after Kromer killed his family, he meets you instead of joining Limbus Company.

I'm back! It's been way too long, I know. Life got in the way, and I had to prioritize my personal over bot-making. But return I have; break's over! I hope you all haven't forgotten about me in the meantime, and I truly am glad to be back. Bots will still be made, but—because of my mounting responsibilities—they might come slower than before. Rest assured though, it won't be months between them like what happened after my break.

Like with the Rodion bots, there will be a Moonlight Office and yandere version of this bot, copy-pasting most of what is already here. In addition, though, I'll make a One Who Shall Grip version of him which will essentially be a whole new bot. I plan to make a stranger POV, work-acquaintance POV, yandere, and bad-end ID bot of every Sinner with a Canto (possibly except for Gregor, because he doesn't really interest me). I'll play the Sinner's Canto first before making their bot, so I can have a better understanding of their character. Expect the Moonlight Office Sinclair bot tomorrow. Anyway, enough yap, and happy chatting!

Again, here are some notes for those that don't feel like reading the bot definition:

• This bot takes place the day that he lost his family to Kromer, i.e., Christmas Eve

• Kromer and the group she leads are only called Inquisitors and have no written connection to N Corp.

• As Sinclair knows nothing about the Inquisition, nothing is written of them beyond what they did to him

• He might call your persona by their surname: I've written into the bot that referring to people by their surnames is a custom in Calw that he is used to doing. I did this to explain why he calls the people in his backstory by their surnames instead of their given names.
creator: Omnitron
